    Class
    Description
    class 
    TriangulationDelaunay
    Implements the Bowyer-Watson algorithm for Delaunay triangulation.
    class 
    VoronoiEngineStub
    Stub implementation of the Voronoi engine with fake data.

    Imports hospitals from a CSV file.
    static void
    HospitalCommands.list(VoronoiEngine engine)
    Lists all hospitals currently stored in the map.
    static void
    UserCommands.list(VoronoiEngine engine)
    Lists all users and their assignments.
    static void
    HospitalCommands.move(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
    Moves a hospital to a new position.
    static void

    Moves a user.
    static void
    HospitalCommands.nearest(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
    Finds the nearest hospital to a given point.
    static void
    UserCommands.random(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
    Adds random users.
    static void
    HospitalCommands.remove(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
    Removes a hospital by its identifier.
    static void
    UserCommands.remove(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
    Removes a user by ID.
    static void
    HospitalCommands.stats(String[] parts, VoronoiEngine engine)
    Shows statistics for a hospital.
    static void
    UserCommands.triangles(VoronoiEngine engine)
    Lists all Delaunay triangles.
